nasb.text: You shall make for them linen breeches to cover their bare flesh; they shall reach from the loins even to the thighs.

esv.text: You shall make for them linen undergarments to cover their naked flesh. They shall reach from the hips to the thighs;

cnv.text: 你要給他們做白麻布褲子，遮蓋裸體，褲子遮蓋腰間，直到大腿。

ccb.text: “要用细麻布为他们做裤子，以遮盖下体，裤子要从腰部到大腿。
